* Modern malware employs contemporary packaging and obfuscation techniques to evade detection by traditional antivirus scanners and security measures.

* Polymorphic malware uses multiple layers to avoid detection, and some malware can automatically upgrade to a newer version at short intervals, making traditional signature-based detection methods ineffective.
